SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.project

Class JkProjectCompilation

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProjectCompilation
public class JkProjectCompilation extends Object
This class handles the compilation phase for a project, including source generation, resource processing, dependency resolution, and Java source compilation. It provides a structured way to customize and extend the compilation process through configurable actions, source generators, and compiler options.

  • Field Details

    • RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION

      public static final String RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • JAVA_SOURCES_COMPILE_ACTION

      public static final String JAVA_SOURCES_COMPILE_ACTION
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • preCompileActions

      public final JkRunnables preCompileActions
      The JkRunnables to run after source and resource generation. User can chain its own runnable to customise the process. Contains RESOURCES_PROCESS_ACTION by default

    • compileActions

      public final JkRunnables compileActions

    • postCompileActions

      public final JkRunnables postCompileActions
      The JkRunnables to be run after compilation. User can chain its own runnable to customise the process. Empty by default.

    • resourceProcessor

      public final JkResourceProcessor resourceProcessor

    • layout

      public final JkCompileLayout layout

    • dependencies

      public final JkDependencySetModifier dependencies

    • procDependencies

      public final JkDependencySetModifier procDependencies

    • generateSources

      public void generateSources()

    • run

      public void run()
      Performs entire compilation phase.

    • runIfNeeded

      public void runIfNeeded()
      As #run but perform only if not already done.

    • skipJavaCompilation

      public void skipJavaCompilation()

      public List<String> getExtraJavaCompilerOptions()
      Returns extra compile options passed to the compiler

      public JkProjectCompilation addJavaCompilerOptions(String... options)
      Adds options to be passed to Java compiler

      public List<Path> resolveDependenciesAsFiles()

      public List<Path> resolveProcessorPathAsFiles()

    • addSourceGenerator

      public JkProjectCompilation addSourceGenerator(JkProjectSourceGenerator sourceGenerator)
      Adds a source generator responsible for generating source files to the project compilation process.
      Parameters:
      sourceGenerator - the JkProjectSourceGenerator instance used for generating sources
      Returns:
      the current instance of JkProjectCompilation to allow method chaining

    • addSourceGenerator

      public JkProjectCompilation addSourceGenerator(String generatorName, BiConsumer<JkProject,Path> generator)
      Adds a source generator responsible for generating source files to the project compilation process. The generator is defined by a name and a BiConsumer action that takes a JkProject and a Path representing the generated source directory.
      Parameters:
      generatorName - the name assigned to the source generator
      generator - a BiConsumer defining the generation behavior by taking a JkProject instance and the directory where sources will be generated
      Returns:
      the current instance of JkProjectCompilation to allow method chaining

    • addSourceGenerator

      public JkProjectCompilation addSourceGenerator(String generatorName, Consumer<Path> generator)
      Adds a source generator responsible for generating source files to the project compilation process. The generator is defined by a name and an action that takes a directory where sources will be generated.
      Parameters:
      generatorName - the name assigned to the source generator
      generator - a Consumer defining the generation behavior by accepting the directory where sources will be generated
      Returns:
      the current instance of JkProjectCompilation to allow method chaining

    • isDone

      public boolean isDone()

      public List<Path> getGeneratedSourceDirs()
